## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss improving reporting and forecasting for Augment Code's editorial progress and explore potential new content strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/49tAzDToCgn8vjdJgkfVpvzzeteh2NQ4?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Current reporting process is manual and time-consuming; automation opportunities identified](https://fathom.video/share/49tAzDToCgn8vjdJgkfVpvzzeteh2NQ4?tab=summary&timestamp=90.0)
  - Augment Code's content performance is strong, with \~10k impressions and \~100 clicks in \<1 month
  - [Dave to create data-driven content forecast for next 12 months by Wednesday](https://fathom.video/share/49tAzDToCgn8vjdJgkfVpvzzeteh2NQ4?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Suleman to develop automated reporting solution using Google Sheets/Looker dashboard](https://fathom.video/share/49tAzDToCgn8vjdJgkfVpvzzeteh2NQ4?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)

## Topics

### Current Reporting Process

  - [George manually pulls data from Google Search Console (GSC) weekly](https://fathom.video/share/49tAzDToCgn8vjdJgkfVpvzzeteh2NQ4?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [Tracks metrics like articles assigned, published, indexed, impressions, and clicks](https://fathom.video/share/49tAzDToCgn8vjdJgkfVpvzzeteh2NQ4?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
  - [Uses Notion for documentation and ROI calculator for forecasting](https://fathom.video/share/49tAzDToCgn8vjdJgkfVpvzzeteh2NQ4?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)
  - [Process is functional but time-consuming and lacks forward-looking projections](https://fathom.video/share/49tAzDToCgn8vjdJgkfVpvzzeteh2NQ4?tab=summary&timestamp=119.0)

### Content Performance Analysis

  - [Augment Code content (/guide section) showing strong early results:](https://fathom.video/share/49tAzDToCgn8vjdJgkfVpvzzeteh2NQ4?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
      - \~10,000 impressions, \~100 clicks in \<1 month
      - [Average position of 8 (page 1-2 results)](https://fathom.video/share/49tAzDToCgn8vjdJgkfVpvzzeteh2NQ4?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)
      - [CTR stabilized at \~0.7% after initial fluctuations](https://fathom.video/share/49tAzDToCgn8vjdJgkfVpvzzeteh2NQ4?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)
  - [Top performing query: "108 top AI engines for auditing code at scale"](https://fathom.video/share/49tAzDToCgn8vjdJgkfVpvzzeteh2NQ4?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
  - [Opportunity identified to optimize page titles for higher CTR](https://fathom.video/share/49tAzDToCgn8vjdJgkfVpvzzeteh2NQ4?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)

### Reporting Automation Solutions

  - [Dave suggested two main options:](https://fathom.video/share/49tAzDToCgn8vjdJgkfVpvzzeteh2NQ4?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)
    1.  Google Sheets with GSC API integration for auto-populating data
    2.  Looker dashboard for visualizing weekly performance
  - [Suleman to assist in building automated reporting solution](https://fathom.video/share/49tAzDToCgn8vjdJgkfVpvzzeteh2NQ4?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Goal: Eliminate manual data entry and provide rolling weekly view of key metrics](https://fathom.video/share/49tAzDToCgn8vjdJgkfVpvzzeteh2NQ4?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

### Content Strategy and Forecasting

  - [Dave to create 12-month content forecast for Augment Code by Wednesday](https://fathom.video/share/49tAzDToCgn8vjdJgkfVpvzzeteh2NQ4?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Will use competitor data to identify winnable traffic opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/49tAzDToCgn8vjdJgkfVpvzzeteh2NQ4?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Forecast to include current strategy plus potential new topic areas:](https://fathom.video/share/49tAzDToCgn8vjdJgkfVpvzzeteh2NQ4?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)
      - [AI coding database](https://fathom.video/share/49tAzDToCgn8vjdJgkfVpvzzeteh2NQ4?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)
      - [Learning how to code](https://fathom.video/share/49tAzDToCgn8vjdJgkfVpvzzeteh2NQ4?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)
      - [Prompt engineering](https://fathom.video/share/49tAzDToCgn8vjdJgkfVpvzzeteh2NQ4?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)
  - [Augment Code open to aggressive growth strategies with clear ROI](https://fathom.video/share/49tAzDToCgn8vjdJgkfVpvzzeteh2NQ4?tab=summary&timestamp=804.0)

### Additional Initiatives

  - [Augment Code considering $10k investment in backlink strategy campaign](https://fathom.video/share/49tAzDToCgn8vjdJgkfVpvzzeteh2NQ4?tab=summary&timestamp=807.0)
  - [Targeting rankings for "AI coding" and 2-3 other keywords](https://fathom.video/share/49tAzDToCgn8vjdJgkfVpvzzeteh2NQ4?tab=summary&timestamp=807.0)
  - [Weekly reporting crucial for stakeholder updates](https://fathom.video/share/49tAzDToCgn8vjdJgkfVpvzzeteh2NQ4?tab=summary&timestamp=824.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Dave to complete content forecast for Augment Code by Wednesday morning](https://fathom.video/share/49tAzDToCgn8vjdJgkfVpvzzeteh2NQ4?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Suleman to develop automated reporting solution (timeline TBD)](https://fathom.video/share/49tAzDToCgn8vjdJgkfVpvzzeteh2NQ4?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [George to manually update numbers for Wednesday client meeting](https://fathom.video/share/49tAzDToCgn8vjdJgkfVpvzzeteh2NQ4?tab=summary&timestamp=1030.0)
